mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.product_id, p.product_name, r.user_id, u.name AS user_name, r.writer_type, r.rating, r.content, r.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments rc WHERE rc.review_id = r.id) AS comment_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(rating)::numeric, 1), 0) AS average_rating FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT r.id, r.product_id, p.product_name, r.user_id, u.name AS user_name, r.writer_type, r.rating, r.content, r.status, 0 AS comment_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at, CASE WHEN cat.depth = 1 THEN cat.category_name ELSE root.category_name END AS root_category_name FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id JOIN categories cat ON p.category_id = cat.category_id LEFT JOIN categories root ON cat.parent_id = root.category_id WHERE r.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.id, r.product_id, p.product_name, r.user_id, u.name AS user_name, r.writer_type, r.rating, r.content, r.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments rc WHERE rc.review_id = r.id) AS comment_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT r.id, r.product_id, p.product_name, r.user_id, u.name AS user_name, r.writer_type, r.rating, r.content, r.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comments rc WHERE rc.review_id = r.id) AS comment_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (product_id, user_id, writer_type, rating, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{userId}, #{writerType}, #{rating}, #{content}, 'PUBLISHED', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE status = #{status}
